title: Farm Tractor and Trailer Set 3 Pieces Durable Plastic Farm Vehicle Toy Playset Tractor-Trailer Themed Fun
features: DURABLE PLASTIC SET - This unique set includes 3 pieces Tractor & Trailer. Let your child's imagination go wild and let them start farming through a constantly expanding world of awesome plastic tractors and trailer sets. This tractor and trailer set will help create many hours of imaginative fun.

EDUCATIONAL TRACTOR & TRAILER SET - Intelligence, speech, and hand-eye coordination skills will develop while playing with this unique plastic tractor-trailer set. All pieces are lightweight and perfect for pretend play with friends.

FARM TRACTOR TRAILER PLAYSET - Let farming begin! Let’s develop a better understanding of farm life, work, and animals. This set will be a great example and representation of how farmers plant and grew vegetables and raise animals with the help of tractor-trailers. Every little farmer needs to know and recognise what equipment and vehicles for a specific task should use. This toy kit will allow seeing the difference between them and by playing sensory curiosity and self-expression will develop. Endless tractor-trailer-themed fun!
PERFECT GIFT - This set makes a great gift and is the perfect starter pack for any child who loves farm yard toys. Help your little ones to build their very own collections of tractor-trailer set.

DIMENSIONS - Each Set contains:- 3 plastic farm vehicles and 3 different trailer attachments. Dimensions of the Tractors are approx 9cm Long and Trailers are approx 10cm Long.
Warning: Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts.
